economic_notes: Band operated enterprises include income from renting band-owned equipment, lease income and other projects. First Nation is negotiating a land claim with Canada. Disputing municipal tax assessment of approximately $1,220,000. Committed $585,750 to Robinson Huron Treaty Trust for legal action against Canada and Ontario.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED on consolidated results of operations, changes in net debt and cash flows due to prior year dispensary cash receipts recorded on cash basis affecting comparability. Three consolidated subsidiaries: TFN Economic Development Corporation, Elite Bio-Centre Productions Inc., Goganonganga Limited Partnership. Significant landfill closure liability of $1,390,020. Land claim negotiation ongoing with $250,958 in forgiven loans advanced. Robinson Huron Treaty Trust commitment of $585,750 for Stage Three Trial legal costs.
